S.FORM: == Alex Blackwell == u siwkay niza Alex Blackwell, tatama, nalecuhan 6 bulad 27 demiad, 1970 a mihcan, miunduay, mimali i Amilika NBA. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Robert Alexander Blackwell is a retired American professional basketball player, who had a brief stint with the Los Angeles Lakers of the NBA. A 6'6", 250 lb forward born in Toms River, New Jersey, he attended Monmouth College in West Long Branch, New Jersey.During the 1992‚Äď93 NBA season, Blackwell was used sparingly by the Lakers, playing 27 games, averaging 1.3 points and 0.9 rebounds per game. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
S.PHON: == ar~…ĺ…ô* br~…ĺa ¶kw…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ == u siwkaj niza ar~…ĺ…ô* br~…ĺa ¶kw…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ, tatama, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶an, miunduaj, mimar~…ĺi i amir~…ĺika nba. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika *ob…ôrt ar~…ĺ…ô*and…ôr br~…ĺa ¶kw…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ is a r…ôtir…ôd am…ôri ¶an prof…ôssionar~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ pr~…ĺaj…ôr, wńßo ńßad a bri…ôf stint witńß tńß…ô r~…ĺos aŇč…ôr~…ĺ…ôs r~…ĺak…ôrs of tńß…ô nba. a * Ē~ °*", *** r~…ĺb forward born in toms *i*…ôr, n…ôw *…ôrs…ô, ńß…ô att…ônd…ôd monmoutńß ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôg…ô in w…ôst r~…ĺoŇč bran ¶ńß, n…ôw *…ôrs…ô.duriŇč tńß…ô ******* nba s…ôason, br~…ĺa ¶kw…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ was us…ôd spariŇčr~…ĺj bj tńß…ô r~…ĺak…ôrs, pr~…ĺajiŇč ** gam…ôs, a*…ôragiŇč *.* points and *.* r…ôbounds p…ôr gam…ô. kakuniza kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan-sur~…ĺu
S.FORM: == Alex Blackwell == u siwkay niza Alex Blackwell, tatama, nalecuhan 6 bulad 27 demiad, 1970 a mihcan, miunduay, mimali i Amilika NBA. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Robert Alexander Blackwell is a retired American professional basketball player, who had a brief stint with the Los Angeles Lakers of the NBA. A 6'6", 250 lb forward born in Toms River, New Jersey, he attended Monmouth College in West Long Branch, New Jersey.During the 1992‚Äď93 NBA season, Blackwell was used sparingly by the Lakers, playing 27 games, averaging 1.3 points and 0.9 rebounds per game. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
